choice: Unbounded scenarios, at most one active Plan, zero allowed
rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: Allow an arbitrary number of named scenarios per household (no hard cap in v1), with AT MOST one designated the active Plan at a time. A household can exist with zero scenarios marked (forecasts still run, but actuals-vs-Plan tracking has no baseline until one is marked Plan); marking a different scenario as Plan is an explicit, auditable action. The active-Plan flag lives on the household, mirroring the active-household pattern (e0aff0bb).)
